title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 492.580 - Legal exceptions may be taken
text:
492.580.  Legal exceptions may be taken. — All legal exceptions may be taken and allowed to the reading of such depositions, in any trial in which the same may be offered in evidence.
(RSMo 1939 § 1969) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1805; 1919 § 5492; 1909 § 6435
